summary_one_line: ICC profile color-space signature at offset 0x10 must equal the FourCC 'GRAY' so cmsSigGrayData switch arm is taken

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte color-space signature field at file offset 0x10-0x13 must be the ASCII FourCC 'GRAY' (47 52 41 59). cmsGetColorSpace reads this field and only 'GRAY' makes Space==cmsSigGrayData, selecting the case at cmspcs.c:727 (the globally-blocked true side).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 'GRAY' (47 52 41 59) at offsets 0x10-0x13 and the W column hits the cmsSigGrayData arm at L727; loser-blocking seeds never do.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) at offsets 0x10-0x13, so Space==cmsSigRgbData; they take the L732 RgbData arm and the cmsSigGrayData true side at L727 stays unhit (T=0).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which copies the exact 4-byte constant compared at runtime (the 'GRAY' signature literal) into the input position where the seed's color-space field appears. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a CMP_MAP distance bucket, which gives no direct path to the exact 4-byte FourCC, so it never flips 'RGB ' to 'GRAY'.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the cmsSigGrayData switch arm; its true side is globally blocked.
The switch dispatches on Space, which is set from cmsGetColorSpace on the input profile.
Winner seeds carry the ASCII 'GRAY' signature at offset 0x10.
Loser seeds carry 'RGB ' at offset 0x10 instead of 'GRAY'.
The per-offset byte diff confirms W='GRAY' vs L='RGB ' at offsets 0x10-0x13.
In the loser run the cmsSigGrayData true side is never taken while the cmsSigRgbData arm is.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 727  T=12 F=12  T=0 F=20  case cmsSigGrayData: if (White)    *White = GrayWhite;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks.
value_profile only writes a coarse CMP_MAP distance bucket and has no I2SRandReplace substitution.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2233 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 49cad751418262c9` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain, the characteristic unwrapped-I2SRandReplace signal under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating cmsSigGrayData on a 4-byte 'GRAY' FourCC where value_profile (no I2S) resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog would refute the claim that I2S substitution of the exact 4-byte literal is what gives the winner its edge.

weakest_evidence_point: The seed bytes prove the GRAY-vs-RGB FourCC difference, but the lineage dash row is only a floor signal for I2S (the literal mutator name is not logged), so attributing the specific GRAY substitution to I2SRandReplace rather than a lucky havoc/token find is inferential.
